field.label: License Key
field.comment:
Paste the SP-XXXX key from your purchase email, or a per-module HMAC key, or a shared eTechFlow bundle key. Bound to the domain you provided at checkout.
A valid licence is always required. www. prefix is normalised.

field.label: Bundle License Key
field.comment:
Shared key across ALL eTechFlow modules. If you purchased the eTechFlow Bundle, paste it here once and every installed eTechFlow module activates.
Stored encrypted.

field.label: License Portal URL
field.comment: The eTechFlow portal endpoint that validates SP-XXXX subscription keys. Default: https://license-service.etechflow.com/license/validate. Change only if eTechFlow notifies you of a new portal URL.

field.label: Last Issued Key (auto-managed)
field.comment: Read-only audit field. Auto-populated when the portal accepts a key for the first time. Used by the module to auto-restore the licence after a portal IP-block lift. Do not edit.

field.label: Enable module (master switch)
field.comment: Master switch. While OFF, the module emits no schema. A valid licence is also required.
field.tooltip: Turns the whole rich-snippets module on or off. Keep this OFF while another SEO/snippets extension (e.g. Mirasvit) is active, so you don't output duplicate structured data.

field.label: Enable product rich snippet
field.tooltip: Adds Product structured data (price, availability, brand, reviews) to product pages so Google can show rich results.

field.label: Emit ProductGroup for configurables
field.comment: Outputs ProductGroup + hasVariant for configurable products.
field.tooltip: For configurable products, lists every variant (size/colour, etc.) as a ProductGroup. Has no effect on simple products.

field.label: Brand attribute code
field.tooltip: The product attribute code that holds the brand name, e.g. "brand" or "manufacturer". Leave as "brand" if unsure.

field.label: MPN attribute code
field.tooltip: Manufacturer Part Number attribute code. Many stores simply use "sku" here.

field.label: GTIN-13 attribute code
field.comment: Leave empty if products have no barcode.
field.tooltip: Attribute code holding the 13-digit barcode (EAN). Leave blank for products without a barcode, such as bespoke keys.

field.label: Item condition attribute code
field.comment: Optional. Values containing used/refurbished/damaged map to schema.org conditions; otherwise NewCondition.
field.tooltip: Optional attribute code for item condition. Values containing "used", "refurbished" or "damaged" are mapped automatically. Leave blank to always mark items as New.

field.label: Enable category rich snippet
field.tooltip: Adds an ItemList of the products shown on the current page, plus a breadcrumb, to category and filtered (landing) pages.

field.label: Enable OpenGraph + Twitter meta
field.tooltip: Adds OpenGraph and Twitter Card tags so links shared on social media (Facebook, WhatsApp, X, LinkedIn) show a title, image and price.

field.label: Enable WebPage schema (CMS + home)
field.tooltip: Adds WebPage structured data to CMS pages and the home page, linked to your Organization and WebSite.
